title: sambucus pubens f. albicocca
intro: Sambucus pubens f. albicocca, also known as the American white elderberry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the Adoxaceae family. The plant's flowers, leaves, and berries have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sambucus pubens f. albicocca include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support respiratory health and provide relief from sinus pressure and congestion.
